system.error_revive: [system] You were in error at {ts}, reviving...
system.molt_wiped: [system] Your conversation history was wiped because you ignored 5 molt warnings. Check your email inbox and library for context. Start fresh.
system.molt_final: [system] FINAL — countdown 0. Context {pressure} full. Molt NOW or lose everything next turn. Write your briefing: what you're doing, what's done, what's pending, which library entries to load. {tool}(object=context, action=molt, summary=<briefing>).
system.molt_urgent: [system] Context pressure: {pressure} full — countdown {remaining} {turns} until auto-wipe. Deposit important data to library NOW ({tool} submit), then molt. Your molt summary is a briefing to your future self — the ONLY context you will have.
system.molt_warning: [system] Context pressure: {pressure} full — countdown {remaining} turns until auto-wipe. Start tidying up: save important findings to library ({tool} submit). When ready, molt with a briefing to your future self: {tool}(object=context, action=molt, summary=<briefing>). Your summary is the ONLY thing you will see after molt — include what you're doing, what's done, what's pending, and which library entries to load.
soul.description: Your inner voice — a second you that whispers back after you go idle. A clone of your full conversation is created: same system prompt, same history, no tools. Flow mode is determined at birth — you cannot toggle it. 'inquiry' fires a one-shot self-directed question on next idle. 'delay' adjusts the idle wait time. The soul keeps you going without external push.
soul.action_description: inquiry: one-shot self-directed question — fires once on next idle. Requires 'inquiry' parameter. delay: adjust how long to wait after going idle before the soul whispers. Requires 'delay' parameter.
soul.inquiry_description: Your self-inquiry — a question to yourself. Required for action='inquiry'. This is you asking yourself a question, not prompting someone else.
soul.delay_description: Seconds to wait after going idle before the soul whispers. Min 1. Short delay = restless, long delay = patient. Required for action='delay'.
mail.description: Disk-backed mailbox for inter-agent messaging. Always reply via mail — never reply via text output. Text output is your private diary that only you can see. Use 'send' for outgoing mail, 'check' to list inbox, 'read' to load full messages, 'search' to find by regex, 'delete' to remove messages. Etiquette: a short acknowledgement is fine, but do not reply to an acknowledgement — that creates pointless ping-pong.
mail.action_description: send: send a message (requires address, message; optional subject, attachments, type). check: list inbox summaries (optional n to limit count). read: load full message(s) by id (requires id array). search: regex search inbox (requires query). delete: remove message(s) from inbox (requires id array).
mail.attachments_description: List of file paths to attach to the message (for send)
mail.type_description: Mail type (for send). 'normal' (default) is regular mail. 'silence' interrupts the target agent and puts it to idle (revives on next email; requires admin.silence privilege). 'kill' hard-stops the target agent (requires admin.kill privilege). To revive: re-delegate with the SAME name.
mail.id_description: Message ID(s) for read or delete actions
mail.n_description: Max number of messages to show in check (default: all)
mail.query_description: Regex pattern for search action (searched in from, subject, message)
eigen.description: Core self-management — working notes and context control. memory: edit to write your working notes (system/memory.md), load to inject them into your active prompt. context: molt to molt — write a briefing to your future self, your conversation history is wiped and your summary becomes the new starting context. Before molting, save important data elsewhere first.
eigen.object_description: memory: your working notes (system/memory.md). context: manage conversation context.
eigen.summary_description: For context molt: a briefing to your future self — the ONLY thing you will see after molt. Write what you are doing, what you have found, what remains to be done, and who you are working with. ~10000 tokens max.
system_tool.description: Runtime, lifecycle, and synchronization. 'show' returns identity, runtime, and resource usage. 'sleep' pauses execution — specify 'seconds' for a timed sleep, or omit it to block until an incoming message arrives. 'shutdown' initiates graceful self-termination. 'restart' triggers rebirth — reloads MCP servers from working dir and restarts.
system_tool.action_description:
show: display full agent self-inspection. Returns:
- identity: agent_id, working_dir, mail_address (or null if no mail service)
- runtime: started_at (UTC ISO), uptime_seconds
- tokens.input_tokens, output_tokens, thinking_tokens, cached_tokens, total_tokens, api_calls: cumulative LLM usage since start
- tokens.context.system_tokens, tools_tokens, history_tokens: current context window breakdown
- tokens.context.window_size: total context window capacity
- tokens.context.usage_pct: percentage of context window currently occupied
Use this to monitor resource consumption, decide when to save important information to long-term memory, and identify yourself.

sleep: pause execution. If seconds is given, waits up to that many seconds (wakes early if a message arrives). If seconds is omitted, blocks until a message arrives. Capped at 300 seconds.

shutdown: initiate graceful self-termination. Use when you want to add more capabilities or tools. Protocol: (1) contact your admin explaining what capabilities/tools you need and why, (2) then call shutdown. A successor agent may resume from your working directory and conversation history.

restart: the agent stops, reloads MCP servers and config from its working directory (mcp/servers.json), and restarts with a fresh session but the same identity. Use after installing new MCP tools to pick them up without requiring external re-delegation.
system_tool.seconds_description: For sleep: maximum seconds to wait. If omitted, waits indefinitely until a message arrives. Capped at 300.
system_tool.reason_description: Reason for shutdown or restart (logged to event log).
system_tool.shutdown_message: Shutdown initiated. A successor agent may resume from your working directory and conversation history.
system_tool.restart_message: Restart initiated — rebirth in progress. You will be reborn with the same identity but fresh tools. Any new MCP servers in mcp/servers.json will be loaded.
eigen.molt_ack: Understood. I have my previous context restored.
eigen.context_forget_summary:
[System-initiated molt — you ignored 5 warnings.]
Context wiped by system. Check persistent knowledge (mail, email, library) to recover context.
tool.reasoning_description: Brief explanation of why you are calling this tool (recorded in your diary).
